channel.title: ITIN Lending
channel.description: ITINLending.net helps ITIN holders and foreign nationals find mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, business loans, and credit cards, no SSN required. Independent guides and lender matching.

item.title: Can You Get a Payday Loan With an ITIN? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, some payday lenders accept ITINs, but APRs can reach 400%+. Learn how ITIN payday loans work, what they cost, and the safer alternatives to use instead.

item.title: Can You Get a Debt Consolidation Loan With an ITIN?
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can get debt consolidation loans through credit unions and specialty lenders. Learn how to qualify, what rates to expect, and safer alternatives.

item.title: Can You Rent an Apartment With an ITIN? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can rent an apartment with an ITIN. Learn how ITIN holders pass tenant screening, what docs landlords accept, and tips to boost approval odds in 2026.

item.title: Can You Get a Secured Credit Card With an ITIN? (2026)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can get a secured credit card without an SSN. Compare top cards, deposit requirements, and how each one reports to the credit bureaus.

item.title: How to Send Money Internationally With an ITIN (2026)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can send money abroad using apps like Wise, Remitly, and Western Union. No SSN required. Learn which services accept ITINs and how to avoid fees.

item.title: Can You Get Auto Insurance With an ITIN? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can get auto insurance with an ITIN number. Learn which carriers accept ITIN, what documents you need, and how to avoid overpaying in 2026.

item.title: Can You Get a Credit Builder Loan With an ITIN? (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a credit builder loan with an ITIN. No SSN required. Learn which lenders accept ITINs, how the loan works, and how fast your score can grow.

item.title: Can You Open a Savings Account With an ITIN? (2026)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can open FDIC-insured savings accounts at many U.S. banks, no SSN required. Learn which banks accept ITINs, what documents you need, and how to earn the best APY.

item.title: Can You Get Life Insurance With an ITIN? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can get life insurance with an ITIN number. Learn which carriers accept ITINs, what requirements apply, and how to get the best rate without an SSN.

item.title: Can You Open an IRA With an ITIN? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can open a Traditional or Roth IRA without an SSN. Learn contribution limits, eligible platforms, and how to start saving for retirement in 2026.

item.title: How to Check Your Credit Score With an ITIN (2026)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can check their credit score, but the process differs from SSN holders. This step-by-step guide shows you exactly how to access all 3 bureaus.

item.title: ITIN Mortgage Documents Checklist (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can get a mortgage with an ITIN. Here's the exact document checklist lenders require in 2026, income, ID, credit, and more.

item.title: Best ITIN Mortgage Lenders: How to Find One (2026)
item.description: ITIN mortgage lenders include non-QM lenders, credit unions, CDFIs, and portfolio banks. Learn which lender types accept ITINs, what rates to expect, and how to compare.

item.title: ITIN Mortgage Loan Programs: How They Work (2026)
item.description: ITIN mortgage programs let you buy a home without an SSN using Non-QM loans. Learn how they work, down payments, credit rules, and which program fits you.

item.title: How to Qualify for an ITIN Mortgage (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can qualify for an ITIN mortgage without an SSN. Learn the exact income, credit, down payment, and documentation requirements lenders use in 2026.

item.title: ITIN Mortgage Rates in 2026: What to Expect & How to Lower Them
item.description: ITIN mortgage rates run 1-3% above conventional loans in 2026. Learn why, what drives your rate, and the exact steps to get the lowest rate possible.

item.title: How to Renew Your ITIN Number in 2026 (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Your ITIN expires if unused for 3 years. Learn exactly how to renew it with Form W-7 in 2026, before it delays your loan, mortgage, or tax refund.

item.title: Can You Get a Student Loan With an ITIN? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can get private student loans, though federal aid requires an SSN. Learn which lenders accept ITINs, state options, and how to qualify in 2026.

item.title: How to Open a Bank Account With an ITIN (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can open a U.S. bank account with an ITIN. Learn which banks accept ITINs, what documents you need, and how the 2026 rules affect ITIN holders.

item.title: Can You Get a Home Equity Loan With an ITIN? (2026)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can access home equity loans and HELOCs without an SSN. Learn which lenders qualify you, what documents you need, and how rates compare.

item.title: How to Refinance a Mortgage With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can refinance. Learn rate-and-term vs. cash-out options, lender requirements, LTV limits, and how to lower your monthly payment without an SSN.

item.title: How to Build Credit With an ITIN Number (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, you can build U.S. credit with an ITIN, no SSN required. Learn the fastest, proven steps: secured cards, credit-builder loans, and rent reporting.

item.title: How to Get a Credit Card With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a credit card with an ITIN, no SSN needed. Compare ITIN-friendly cards, learn which issuers accept them, and start building U.S. credit today.

item.title: How to Get a Personal Loan With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a personal loan with an ITIN, no SSN required. Learn which lenders accept ITIN, what rates to expect, and how to qualify in 2026.

item.title: How to Get a Business Loan With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a business loan with an ITIN, even after 2026 SBA rule changes. Discover which lenders still fund ITIN holders, what docs you need, and how to qualify.

item.title: How to Get a Car Loan With an ITIN Number (2026)
item.description: Yes, you can get a car loan with an ITIN, no SSN required. Learn which lenders accept ITIN, what documents you need, and how to qualify in 2026.

item.title: How to Buy a House With an ITIN Number (2026 Guide)
item.description: Yes, ITIN holders can buy a home in the U.S. Learn 2026 requirements, down payments, lender types, and a step-by-step process, no SSN needed.

item.title: Can You Get an ITIN Loan With Bad Credit?
item.description: Yes, here's how ITIN holders with bad or no credit can still get approved for a loan, which lenders are most flexible, and how to improve your odds.
